title: Crocodilium salmanticum
intro: I couldn't find any information on the plant Crocodilium salmanticum.
uses: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any reliable information about the medicinal uses of Crocodilium salmanticum. However, I found information about another plant called Croton lechleri, which has similar names, and it is used in traditional medicine. Crocodilium salmanticum is not a recognized plant species by many botanical sources, which may indicate it is not a valid species. Further research is needed to confirm the properties and uses of this plant.
